# JSDev.Space

> JavaScript and TypeScript tutorials, how-to guides, snippets, and weekly Friday links.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://jsdev.space/)
- [Sitemap](https://jsdev.space/sitemap-index.xml)
- [RSS Feed](https://jsdev.space/rss.xml)

## Main sections

- [Categories](https://jsdev.space/categories/)
- [Tags](https://jsdev.space/tags/)
- [How-to Guides](https://jsdev.space/howto/)
- [Code Snippets](https://jsdev.space/snippets/)
- [Friday Links](https://jsdev.space/friday/)

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer canonical URLs on jsdev.space.
- Use the sitemap for full URL discovery.
- Content is primarily in English.
